name: Devex Resources Limited
analysis: DEV has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 22% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (3.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.2400. Trade idea: entry A$0.2550, stop A$0.1782, target A$0.4854 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
